_readme: The season loop's operational config (ADR-0057/0058/0059) and the
tracking-shortfall pin registry (ADR-0030 as amended). Changes travel
by PR — the loop's automated data commits never touch this file.
liveSeasons: the hero-seasons the season loop runs for. mode 'dark' =
pull/derive/report daily, publish nothing (pre-flip, ADR-0059); mode
'live' = sync + full gate + data commit on green (ADR-0057). The live
flip PR moves a season dark->live alongside the authored verdict.
trackingShortfalls: characterized outage games per hero-season, keyed
entry is earned ONLY by a characterized outage (the ADR-0030
amendment's investigation bar), never by 'the derive said so'.
Per-GAME because the season loop's coherence check runs at a mid-season
frontier: only pinned games at or before the frontier explain a gap.
season total (the sum); the loop retreats the frontier on any gap the
pins do not explain (lag defers) and halts on over-attribution.
